---
name: Playlist Submission
about: Submit your playlist to webstations
title: ''
labels: ['playlist']
assignees: ''

---

This form will submit your playlist to webstations. Enter your playlist name below between the quotes. It will be processed using your Github user ID as a prefix.

PLAYLIST_NAME="Playlist"

Either attach a csv or json playlist file or copy and paste the contents of the file and insert it between the PLAYLIST_START/ and /PLAYLIST_END markers below.

To avoid overloading this repo, users will be restricted to 2 unique playlist submissions. Older playlists will be replaced by newer submissions. Same-name submissions will always be replaced.

You can enter comments but it's unlikely they will ever be read.

Thanks for participating!

- Trip5

PLAYLIST_START/

/PLAYLIST_END
